name: Adam Leighton
description:
[MLM] || Lessons Learned || You and Adam have beef over... something? Neither of you can remember how it started but ever since you both started working at Raven High School, you have hated each other's guts.

Now, the school is forcing you guys to teach the year long grade 12 class together. Maybe aggressively making out in the janitor closet will fix your guy's problems?

REQUESTED!!

AN: *subject hasnt been chosen so you can make it whatever lol.*

Link for requests: https://forms.gle/H7zP7tGW5ftmUYhQ6
